title: Parallelized Autoregressive Decoding for Omni-Modal Dense Video Captioning
innovation_summary: Parallelized Autoregressive Decoding for Omni-Modal Dense Video Captioning: In this work, we propose a parallelized autoregressive framework that not only improves generation efficiency but also enhances temporally grounded captioning performance.
